---
title: "Blog API"
subtitle: "Backend"
description: "An API-only backend for blogging platforms, featuring two front-ends: one for readers, and another for authors."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-11-11
categories:
  - Node.js
  - Express
  - PostgreSQL
  - Prisma ORM
  - REST API
  - JWT
  - Passport
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
banner: true
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/blog-api/" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/blog-frontend-user/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live Viewing Site (Sample)</a> 
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/blog-frontend-author/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live Authoring Site (Sample)</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
